tagline: E-commerce platform for Rogers dealers with sales attribution & tracking

challenge.headline: No way to track which rep made each online sale
challenge.description: Standard e-commerce platforms couldn't attribute sales to individual representatives, making it impossible for Rogers dealers to measure team performance or distribute commissions fairly. Managing complex telecom product catalogs with carrier plans, devices, and accessories added further operational strain.

result.headline: Digital commerce built for dealer teams
result.quote: CellEasy bridged the gap between traditional retail sales structures and digital commerce, improving visibility into team performance and creating a more structured and scalable approach to wireless retail distribution.
